title: Withdrawer
description: Withdraw various currencies into physical items!
body:
Withdrawer is a way for players to withdraw their money, exp, hp or others onto physical items, so they can redeem them, trade them, sell them or store them as they wish.

## Features * Withdraw your money, exp or hp onto items! * Use the API to implement a new item that fits your needs! * Bulk-Redeeming while pressing down the Shift Key. * Messages and Sounds are all configurable, such as plugin prefix. * The items are all configurable. ![Plugin working GIF](https://i.imgur.com/fYqqCyu.gif)
